title: PineconeAssetComponent
description: Upsert, delete, query, or create a Pinecone vector index as a Dagster asset. Designed for RAG pipelines where embedding generation and vector storage are separate, observable pipeline steps.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

api_key_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the Pinecone API key.

index_name.description: Name of the Pinecone index to operate on.

operation.description: Operation to perform against the Pinecone index.

upstream_asset_key.description: Asset key whose output provides a pandas DataFrame with vector data.

source_database_url_env_var.description: Env var holding a SQLAlchemy database URL. Vectors are read from the database when set.

source_table.description: Table to read from when source_database_url_env_var is set and source_query is not provided.

source_query.description: SQL SELECT statement to fetch vectors. Takes precedence over source_table.

id_column.description: DataFrame column whose values become Pinecone vector IDs.

vector_column.description: DataFrame column containing the embedding arrays.

metadata_columns.description: Additional DataFrame columns to store as Pinecone vector metadata.

namespace.description: Pinecone namespace to target. Uses the default namespace when null.

batch_size.description: Number of vectors per upsert batch.

cloud.description: Cloud provider for the serverless index.

region.description: Cloud region for the serverless index.

description.description: Human-readable description surfaced in the Dagster UI.

deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on.
